title: Junior Business Development Manager at Jones Lang LaSalle

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Jones Lang LaSalle
jsonLd.description:
Jones Lang LaSalle, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jones Lang LaSalle:
Jones Lang LaSalle is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jones Lang LaSalle!
